name: Lemon Pudding Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks until thick and lemony, about 5-8 minutes.
2. Blend in the lemon juice, lemon peel, and butter.
3. In a separate bowl, combine sugar, flour, and salt.
4. Add milk to the sugar mixture, mixing well after each addition.
5. Fold the beaten egg whites into the batter.
6. Pour the batter into a 1-1/2 quart baking dish.
7. Set the dish in a pan of hot water and bake for 50 minutes in a preheated 350°F oven until lightly browned.
8. Serve warm with whipped cream.
